full_text:
Zuo Chengzu 左丞祖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Chengzu (左丞祖)was born in Behai. Able in planning, ignored by Kong Rong. Later executed for suggesting Rong seek allies. Zuo Chengzu was affiliated with Kong Rong.
